overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a neon-lit futuristic city center. The player character walks along wet red sidewalks past towering skyscrapers covered in holographic advertisements, occasionally turning to survey street traffic and looking up at massive architectural structures.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial sidewalk with large billboards

events.description: player turns right to observe the street intersection and traffic
teal sports car drives past on the right side of the street

agents.ego_description: walking along the wet red sidewalk then turning to survey the intersection and passing traffic

notable_agents.action: teal sports car driving past the intersection

entered.detail: large pink billboard displaying 'PASSION' with female figure
tall buildings covered in pink and cyan neon advertisements
green metal railings separating sidewalk from street
tall palm trees lining the left side of the walkway

segments.scene_description: The segment begins with a walk along a wet red sidewalk in a futuristic city at night. The massive pink 'Passion' billboard dominates the right side while neon-lit skyscrapers rise in the distance. The player turns right to observe the street intersection where a teal sports car passes by.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense commercial corridor with street vendors and holographic ads

events.description: turning back to continue down the main sidewalk corridor with dense neon signage
pedestrian in white jacket passes close to camera on the right side

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the neon-lit sidewalk, passing other pedestrians and street vendors selling magazines

notable_agents.action: person in white jacket and light pants walking past the camera

entered.detail: massive cyan holographic projection of a face on building facade
small stall with magazines and items displayed for sale
tree decorated with red glowing neon lights

segments.scene_description: Continuing down the main commercial corridor, the player passes through a moderate crowd of pedestrians. The massive cyan holographic face billboard becomes visible in the distance on the right, while street vendors occupy the sidewalk. The wet pavement reflects the dense neon signage from all directions.

scene_state.functional_zone: vertical canyon of skyscrapers and overhead structures

events.description: camera tilts upward to look at the towering skyscrapers and bridge connections above

agents.ego_description: stopping to look up at the massive architectural structures, bridge connections, and neon signs overhead

entered.detail: elevated bridge connecting two massive towers high above the street
tall vertical digital screens displaying advertisements on building facades

segments.scene_description: The player looks straight up into the night sky, revealing the immense scale of the surrounding architecture. A skybridge connects two towers overhead, while vertical neon billboards illuminate the facades of the glass skyscrapers against the dark cloudy sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: major intersection with pedestrian crosswalk and overpass

events.description: approaching crosswalk with multiple vehicles passing through the intersection
slowing down at the crosswalk edge while observing traffic

agents.ego_description: walking toward the crosswalk and waiting for traffic to pass before crossing the street

notable_agents.action: yellow sports car driving through the intersection

entered.detail: white striped pedestrian crossing markings on the wet asphalt
street sign indicating speed limit of 40
elevated highway structure crossing above the street level

segments.scene_description: The player approaches a major intersection with zebra crosswalk markings. An elevated highway overpass spans the road ahead. The cyan holographic face billboard is now closer on the right side. Vehicles including a yellow sports car pass through the intersection as the player waits at the crosswalk edge.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a neon-drenched futuristic city center, moving from a quiet sidewalk toward a bustling, towering intersection. It begins with a walk along a wet red sidewalk dominated by a massive pink Passion billboard, before the camera turns right to observe a teal sports car crossing a nearby intersection. As the movement continues down the commercial corridor, the scene expands into a crowd of pedestrians and street vendors, with the wet pavement reflecting dense neon signage and a distant cyan holographic face appearing on the right. The camera then tilts sharply upward to reveal the immense scale of glass skyscrapers and a connecting skybridge against a dark, cloudy sky. Finally, the view returns to street level as the player approaches a zebra crosswalk beneath an elevated highway overpass, where a yellow sports car passes by the now-looming cyan holographic billboard.
